cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top 5 numbers selected from the candidate shortlist have the highest scores and align well with the most frequent digits per position from recent draws. The top 50 list extends this selection to include strong candidates with good scores, ensuring coverage of frequent digits and avoiding duplicates.
